summary: Mutation testing infrastructure failed: Stryker vitest-runner cannot resolve .js extension imports to .ts source files (vitest.related incompatibility with ESM TypeScript). Manual analysis performed instead.
testQuality: Tests cover the primary happy-path and error-path behaviors for both handlers. Manual analysis identifies one minor gap: the non-Error thrown value branch (err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)) is not exercised. No tests verify isError is absent on success. Overall coverage is strong for the core behaviors.

suggestions.description: The String(err) branch for non-Error thrown values is untested
suggestions.rationale: When an API client throws a non-Error value (e.g., a plain string or object), the code calls String(err). No test exercises this branch, meaning a mutant that always uses err.message would survive.
suggestions.suggestion: Add test: mockRejectedValue("plain string error") and verify content[0].text equals that string

suggestions.description: No test verifies isError is undefined/absent on successful calls
suggestions.rationale: A mutant setting isError: true unconditionally would not be caught since success-path tests only check content, not the absence of isError.
suggestions.suggestion: Add expect(result.isError).toBeUndefined() to the success-path tests for both listBoardHandler and listFeedHandler
